h1: Our Coconut Shisha Charcoal Factory in Semarang
heroSubtitle: {{legalName}} is the manufacturer of {{brand}} coconut shisha charcoal — a {{facilityAreaGrouped}} m² factory in {{city}}, {{region}}, producing {{capacityMonth}} tons a month across {{productionLines}} lines. We are the factory, not a trading intermediary.

hero.ctaQuoteAria: Request a wholesale quote on WhatsApp (opens WhatsApp)

atAGlance.heading: Factory at a glance
atAGlance.definition: {{brand}} is manufactured in-house at our {{city}} factory. These are the core facts buyers verify first.

intro.p1: {{legalName}}, trading as {{brand}}, is a coconut shell charcoal factory in {{city}}, {{region}}, Indonesia. We are the manufacturer: every briquette is carbonized, milled, pressed, dried, and weathered in our own {{facilityAreaGrouped}} m² facility — not bought from a third party and re-labeled.
intro.p2: We make one product — coconut shisha charcoal — and nothing else. That focus is why our cube, hexagonal, and finger briquettes burn to a consistent, low-ash spec batch after batch: the whole factory is tuned for hookah coals, not split across unrelated product lines.
intro.p3: From our own carbonization plant in {{carbonizationCity}} through pressing, drying, and a {{weatheringDays}}-day weathering window, the process runs end-to-end under one roof. The sections below break down how it's made, how much we can ship, where we source the raw material, and how to verify it for yourself.

ownerNote.heading: From the founder
ownerNote.linkLabel: Read the founder's full note on our About page

team.heading: The people who make your charcoal
team.intro: A trader can't show you an org chart. Here are three of the people on our floor — meet the full team on our About page.
team.ownerBio: Founded the factory in {{year}} and still supervises production every week.
team.qcLeadBio: Runs our in-process quality control and signs off every batch before packing.
team.productionLeadBio: Leads crushing and milling — the first stage that sets particle consistency.

productionProcess.h2: How our coconut charcoal is made
productionProcess.definition: Coconut shisha charcoal is made by carbonizing coconut shell, milling it to powder, binding it with tapioca starch, pressing it into shape, then drying and weathering the briquettes.
facts: Seven stages: carbonization → milling → mixing → pressing → drying → weathering → QC
Binder is food-grade tapioca starch and water — no chemical accelerants
Briquettes are weathered for at least {{weatheringDays}} days before packing
productionProcess.linkLabel: See our full coconut charcoal production process
productionProcess.figureAlt: Coconut charcoal briquettes on the production line at the {{brand}} factory in {{city}}.

capacity.definition: The factory runs {{productionLines}} production lines and {{ovenCount}} carbonization ovens, for {{capacity}} tons per day and {{capacityMonth}} tons per month.
facts: One 20ft container is roughly {{oneContainerPctOfMonthly}}% of monthly output — you won't be deprioritized
capacity.linkLabel: View our production capacity & container lead times
capacity.figureAlt: Carbonization ovens and briquetting lines at the {{brand}} factory in {{city}}.

rawMaterials.definition: Our single raw material is coconut shell — an upcycled byproduct — sourced from {{sourcingRegion}} and carbonized at our own plant in {{carbonizationCity}}.
facts: Coconut shell from {{sourcingVillages}} sourcing villages across {{sourcingRegion}}
We own the carbonization plant in {{carbonizationCity}} — vertical integration, not a broker
A renewable byproduct: no tree is felled to make the charcoal
rawMaterials.linkLabel: Where we source our coconut shell
rawMaterials.figureAlt: Mature coconut shells staged for carbonization at the {{brand}} factory.

virtualTour.definition: You can verify the factory three ways: a video walkthrough, an in-person visit, or your own appointed inspector for pre-shipment inspection.
facts: A short video walkthrough of the production floor
Visit in person — we welcome buyers to see production and container stuffing
Appoint SGS, Intertek, or BV at your cost for pre-shipment inspection
virtualTour.linkLabel: Take a virtual tour or schedule a factory visit
virtualTour.figureAlt: The quality-control bench at the {{brand}} factory in {{city}}.

customization.heading: Customization & OEM
customization.body: Beyond our standard cube, hexagonal, and finger shapes, we produce to your requirements: custom sizes and shapes, and — when you have a target spec — we develop a recipe toward it.
customization.developToSpecNote: Develop-to-spec: give us a target ash, density, or burn time and we'll work a recipe toward it, confirmed by sample — not guaranteed by claim.
customization.ndaNote: We sign a non-disclosure agreement on your designs and brand before any artwork changes hands.

countriesServed.heading: Countries we export to
countriesServed.definition: {{brand}} coconut shisha charcoal ships to {{countriesServedCount}} countries across the Americas, Europe, the Middle East, CIS, and Asia-Pacific.
countriesServed.antiFraudNote: We are a registered Indonesian manufacturer (NIB {{nib}}, NPWP {{taxId}}). Payments are made only to our registered corporate account, shown on the proforma invoice — never to a personal account.

gallery.heading: Inside the factory
gallery.intro: Photographs from the production floor — carbonization, milling, pressing, drying, and the QC bench. Professional photography is in progress; placeholders are shown until the shoot lands.

items.q: Are you a factory or a trader?
items.a: We are the factory. {{legalName}} manufactures {{brand}} coconut shisha charcoal in-house in {{city}} — carbonizing, pressing, drying, and weathering every briquette ourselves. We are not a trading intermediary.
In {{city}}, {{region}}, Indonesia — a {{facilityAreaGrouped}} m² facility. The port of loading is {{portLabel}}.

items.q: What is your monthly production capacity?
items.a: {{capacityMonth}} tons per month — {{capacity}} tons per day across {{productionLines}} lines and {{ovenCount}} carbonization ovens.

items.q: Can you fill a 20ft container every month?
items.a: Easily. One 20ft container (about {{moqTons}} tons) is roughly {{oneContainerPctOfMonthly}}% of our monthly output, so a monthly container — or several — fits well within capacity. You won't be deprioritized.

items.q: Which countries do you export to?
items.a: We ship to {{countriesServedCount}} countries across the Americas, Europe, the Middle East, CIS, and Asia-Pacific. Our priority markets are the USA, UK, Saudi Arabia, Germany, and Russia/CIS.

items.q: Do you only make shisha charcoal?
items.a: Yes. Coconut shisha charcoal is our only product. That specialization is what keeps the burn and ash spec consistent from batch to batch.

items.q: Will you sign an NDA on my brand or design?
items.a: Yes. We sign a non-disclosure agreement on your designs and brand before any artwork is shared, and we can keep your design exclusive to you.

items.label: How to choose a shisha charcoal factory
